info.name: Barbarian
info.description: The Barbarian additions to the Realms of Indoril game series.

description.p: Update your class to be compatible with the Realms of Indoril series of games. This will replace certain class features, add new ones, and augment existing ones.

Starting at 1st level, when your Rage is active, your speed increases by 10 feet, your movement does not provoke opportunity attacks, and your melee weapon attacks deal bonus damage equal to your proficiency bonus.
When your Rage is active, your speed increases by 10 feet, your movement does not provoke opportunity attacks, and your melee weapon attacks deal bonus damage equal to your proficiency bonus.
Starting at 9th level, when your Rage is active, you become almost impossible to restrain, terrify, or overwhelm.
Once per long rest, while raging, when you fail a saving throw against being charmed, frightened, paralyzed, restrained, or stunned, you can choose to succeed instead.
Additionally, while your Rage is active, you add your Constitution modifier to the result of any saving throw you make.
At 13th level, the number of times you can use this feature increases to twice per long rest.
At 17th level, the number of times you can use this feature increases to three times per long rest.
When your Rage is active, you become almost impossible to restrain, terrify, or overwhelm.
Once per long rest, while raging, when you fail a saving throw against being charmed, frightened, paralyzed, restrained, or stunned, you can choose to succeed instead.
Additionally, while your Rage is active, you add your Constitution modifier to the result of any saving throw you make.
Beginning at 5th level, you can attack twice, instead of once, whenever you take the Attack action on your turn.
This increases to three times at 11th level

sheet.description: Test You can attack twice, instead of once, whenever you take the Attack action on your turn.
You can attack three times, instead of once, whenever you take the Attack action on your turn.
